body.title: CLOSED: Implement active lever monitoring — coa.py wiring + watch_problems.lever_watcher
body.result: lever_watcher() wired into coa.py _ne_worker; scans instance.watch_problems against TWM each NE cycle with 24h dedup
body.description:
Igor parks unsolved problems in instance.watch_problems (T-igor-watch-list). The lever watcher scans active watch_problems entries against recent TWM content, using WATCH_Q_* questions from clan.memories as the matching lens.

Implementation: add lever_watcher(pg_conn) to wild_igor/igor/cognition/watch_problems.py. Steps per NE cycle:
1. read_active_problems() — filter last_surfaced_at < now()-24h or null
2. Load recent TWM from instance.twm_observations (last 20 rows)
3. For each problem: keyword overlap between watch_condition tokens and TWM content. Use WATCH_Q_07 ('Where is the lever?') and WATCH_Q_06 ('How could we get around that?') as lens framing.
4. On match: post to channel 'Watch: {problem[:80]} — possible lever: {snippet[:120]}'; mark_surfaced(id)
5. 24h dedup via last_surfaced_at gate

Wire lever_watcher(conn) call into coa.py _ne_worker after the purpose_annotator block.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/watch_problems.py (lever_watcher function), wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py (call lever_watcher from _ne_worker)
**Design rules:** HIGH-inertia pre-approval required for coa.py. PRE-APPROVED by Akien 2026-05-10 ('add it to the queue...now you have stuff to keep you busy for the next couple hours'). Watch questions part of reasoning confirmed 2026-05-10.
**Scope boundary:** In scope: keyword-overlap match + channel post + 24h dedup. Out of scope: embedding match (upgrade later), auto-resolution, UI.
**Test plan:** Test lever_watcher finds match when watch_condition keyword appears in TWM; test 24h dedup suppresses repeats; test no match on unrelated TWM content.
